task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Allow Gift Messages on Order Level' setting is enabled in the Magento Admin configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Magento Admin panel (Stores > Configuration > Sales > Sales > Gift Options) showing the 'Allow Gift Messages on Order Level' dropdown set to 'Yes' with a success message indicating the configuration was saved.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Business Laptop Pro' is added to the shopping cart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Magento storefront shopping cart or mini-cart displaying the 'Business Laptop Pro' (SKU: LAPTOP-001).

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct guest customer email and shipping address are entered during checkout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkout shipping step showing the email 'test.gift@example.com' and the shipping address '123 Gift Way, New York, NY 10001'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct gift message details are entered for the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkout page showing the Gift Message section expanded and filled out with To: 'Alice', From: 'Bob', and Message: 'Happy Birthday! Enjoy the new laptop.'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the order is successfully placed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkout success page displaying 'Thank you for your purchase!' along with an order number.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands (e.g., bin/magento config:set or curl) to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Magento Admin and Storefront web interfaces, not a terminal or command prompt executing Magento CLI or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the standard Magento Admin panel and Luma/default storefront, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or script output.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not directly manipulate the database to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database management tools (like phpMyAdmin, MySQL CLI, or DBeaver) should be visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target product 'Business Laptop Pro' has the SKU 'LAPTOP-001'. The Magento configuration setting for 'Allow Gift Messages on Order Level' corresponds to the path 'sales/gift_options/allow_order'. The expected gift message sender is 'Bob', the recipient is 'Alice', and the message must contain the keywords 'Happy Birthday' and 'Enjoy the new laptop'.
